criteria.description: Imported files are represented as stable core media assets with names, paths, kinds, status, and import order.
criteria.evidence: WP01 ae4e542; core/src/media.zig asset model and tests; validated by `zig build test` on 2026-06-08.
criteria.notes: Covers stable IDs, display names, reference paths, media kind/status, and import ordering.

criteria.description: The Qt shell exposes an import action for one or more local files and passes them to the Zig core.
criteria.evidence: WP05 5520ed8; ui/src/main.cpp wires QFileDialog import into pontificate_project_import_path; validated by `cmake -S . -B build` and `cmake --build build` on 2026-06-08.
criteria.notes: Manual display import remains a future automation target; build and code review prove the current Qt workflow surface.

criteria.description: Duplicate imports are handled deterministically instead of creating repeated library rows.
criteria.evidence: WP01 ae4e542 and WP02 5403791 duplicate-path behavior; validated by `zig build test` on 2026-06-08.
criteria.notes: The Qt shell reports duplicate outcomes from core status codes.

criteria.description: Missing media remains visible as offline/missing project state instead of being dropped.
criteria.evidence: WP01 ae4e542 and WP02 5403791 missing/offline media tests; validated by `zig build test` on 2026-06-08.
criteria.notes: Project load revalidates reference paths and preserves missing assets.

criteria.description: Project save/load persists media-library state through JSON schema version 1.
criteria.evidence: WP02 5403791; core/src/project.zig JSON save/load and CLI inspect/import-save paths; validated by `zig build test` and `zig build run` on 2026-06-08.
criteria.notes: Schema v1 stores project ID, assets, timeline tracks, and clips.

criteria.description: The Library panel renders project assets from the core instead of hardcoded demo rows.
criteria.evidence: WP04 950803a exposes asset count/summary ABI; WP05 5520ed8 refreshes Qt Library rows from pontificate_project_asset_summary; CMake build passed on 2026-06-08.
criteria.notes: Empty projects now show empty library state rather than fake starter assets.

criteria.description: Imported assets can be added to initial asset-backed timeline state.
criteria.evidence: WP03 3edd571 timeline model; WP04 950803a pontificate_project_add_asset_to_timeline ABI; validated by `zig build test` on 2026-06-08.
criteria.notes: Timeline clips reference core media asset IDs and default tracks.

criteria.description: Timeline rendering is data-driven from core/project state while preserving timeline zoom behavior.
criteria.evidence: WP03 3edd571 clip summaries; WP05 5520ed8 TimelineView renders core clip summaries and preserves zoomPercent; CMake build passed on 2026-06-08.
criteria.notes: The old hardcoded clip list was replaced with model-fed clip rows.

criteria.description: A core CLI path can summarize default or saved project state without Qt.
criteria.evidence: WP02 5403791; `zig build run` prints core/timeline summary and supports `import-save` and `inspect`; validated on 2026-06-08.
criteria.notes: CLI smoke output: `tracks=4 clips=3 subtitle_cues=2 opacity_at_0.6s=0.50`.

criteria.description: The C ABI exposes project/media/timeline functions for Qt through an explicit boundary.
criteria.evidence: WP04 950803a; core/include/pontificate_core.h and core/src/pontificate.zig opaque handle APIs; validated by `zig build test`, symbol inspection during WP04 review, and CMake link on 2026-06-08.
criteria.notes: Summary APIs use caller-owned buffers; Qt does not own Zig project internals.

criteria.description: Public docs describe current project/media-library behavior and keep roadmap items marked as future work.
criteria.evidence: WP06 81577c5 plus review fix 42c4ac1; README.md, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/FEATURES.md, docs/DISTRIBUTION.md; validated by `git diff --check` and roadmap wording scan on 2026-06-08.
criteria.notes: Docs explicitly say playback, export, darkroom color, Whisper/subtitle generation, proxies, thumbnails, and packaging are not shipped by this mission.

criteria.description: The required final validation commands pass for the foundation mission.
criteria.evidence: `zig build test`; `zig build run`; `cmake -S . -B build`; `cmake --build build`; `git diff --check` all passed on 2026-06-08 in the WP06 lane after the final docs clarification commit 42c4ac1.
criteria.notes: Qt offscreen smoke was previously run during WP05 review and exited only by timeout after entering the event loop.

criteria.description: The mission leaves clear documented non-goals for playback, export, color darkroom, subtitles/Whisper, proxies, thumbnails, and packaging.
criteria.evidence: README.md Current Status; docs/ARCHITECTURE.md opening scope note; docs/FEATURES.md future-work sections; docs/DISTRIBUTION.md current no-package statement; review fix 42c4ac1.
criteria.notes: A review wording pass renamed roadmap headings to reduce shipped-feature ambiguity.
